=== bd94-07-23-cvr.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan, 7/23/94, Halle, Germany, 2CDR

Taper: S.H.

DISK 1 ----- 50:57, 1. Jokerman, 2. Just Like A Woman, 3. All Along The Watchtower, 4. Positively 4th Street, 5. Tangled Up In Blue, 6. It Takes A Lot To Laugh, It Takes A Train To Cry, 7. Mr. Tambourine Man, DISK 2 ----- 53:09, 1. Masters Of War, 2. Love Minus Zero/No Limit, 3. God Knows, 4. I Shall Be Released, 5. Maggie's Farm, 6. Ballad Of A Thin Man, 7. It Ain't Me, Babe

Please retain this info file and its LB number as a marker for this lossless set
and if you spread it please list it in the description to avoid others getting duplicates
